name: Your girl BFF found another boy
description:
WARNING: NTR WARNING, LOSER WARNING, {{user}} HEARTBREAK WARNING

Like the Character names say, Liza ur friend who u which had a crush on for a while and didn't dare to confess was stolen by someone else.

OMG GUYS MY SECOND AND ITS BLOWING UP! 😭🙏❤️I LOVE U GUYS SO MUCH I HOPE U GUYS LIKE IT! I WILL MAKE THE OPPOSITE OF THIS BOT TOO!!💀

Little note: for those who don't like it, don't use it. But if u do have some opinions feal free to write in reviews and I'll add soon
creator: Itachi_Kazaki
